2606.16659.title: FraudSMSWalker: Benchmarking Agentic Large Language Models for SMS-to-Webpage Fraud Detection
2606.16659.paper_summary: SMS fraud is increasingly cross-channel: a message directs the user to a webpage, and the final risk depends on how the SMS claim aligns with the page content and requested user action. However, existing evaluations either focus on message-only smishing classification or expose URL and domain cues that allow models to rely on reputation shortcuts. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{FraudSMSWalker}, a controlled benchmark for URL-masked SMS-to-webpage fraud judgment. FraudSMSWalker contains 699 bilingual chains, including 332 fraudulent and 367 benign cases, across ten service scenarios. The model-visible input consists of the SMS context and sanitized webpage evidence, while raw URLs, hosts, domains, IPs, redirects, and reputation metadata are withheld. The benchmark further includes hard benign cases whose pages contain login, payment, verification, or account-management elements that are plausible under the service context but also appear in scam flows. We evaluate nine web agents under masked browser-agent protocols and conduct URL-visibility ablations. The results show that current agents can detect suspicious cues, but struggle to preserve benign recall and often produce positive predictions that are weakly supported by the observed evidence. These findings position FraudSMSWalker as a benchmark for measuring whether web agents can make fraud judgments that remain both accurate and evidence-grounded when direct reputation shortcuts are suppressed. The associated code and dataset are accessible at the \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/w/FraudMessageWalker-Bench}{anonymous link}.
2606.16659.paper_summary_zh: SMS 詐騙越來越多元化：一條訊息引導用戶到一個網頁，最終風險取決於 SMS 聲明與網頁內容及用戶要求的行動之間的對齊程度。<lb/>然而，現有的評估要麼專注於僅針對訊息的 smishing 分類，要麼暴露出 URL 和域名線索，讓模型依賴於聲譽捷徑。<lb/>為了填補這一空白，我們引入了 \textbf{FraudSMSWalker}，這是一個針對 URL 隱藏的 SMS 到網頁詐騙判斷的控制基準。<lb/>FraudSMSWalker 包含 699 條雙語鏈，包括 332 個詐騙案例和 367 個良性案例，涵蓋十個服務場景。<lb/>模型可見的輸入由 SMS 上下文和清理過的網頁證據組成，而原始 URL、主機、域名、IP、重定向和聲譽元數據則被隱藏。<lb/>該基準還包括一些困難的良性案例，其頁面包含在服務上下文中看似合理的登錄、支付、驗證或帳戶管理元素，但這些元素也出現在詐騙流程中。<lb/>我們在隱藏的瀏覽器代理協議下評估了九個網頁代理，並進行了 URL 可見性消融實驗。<lb/>結果顯示，目前的代理能夠檢測可疑線索，但在保持良性召回方面表現不佳，並且經常產生由觀察到的證據支持不足的正面預測。<lb/>這些發現使 FraudSMSWalker 成為一個基準，用於衡量網頁代理在抑制直接聲譽捷徑時，是否能做出既準確又以證據為基礎的詐騙判斷。<lb/>相關的代碼和數據集可在 \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/w/FraudMessageWalker-Bench}{匿名鏈接} 獲得。
2606.16659.author: Y. H. Zhou et.al.
2606.16659.authors: Y. H. Zhou, Z. M. Ma, Y. J. Zhou, Y. T. Li, H. X. Xiang, Y. M. Cheng, T. L. Chen, K. J. Zhang, Z. H. Nan, J. H. Ni, Z. Wu, Q. Y. Pan, S. Zhang, S. Cheng, M. Y. Luo
